The Real Value

You're not paying
for the clothes.
You're paying for the eye.

Other stylists charge a fortune and send you to expensive stores. That's two bills, and most women walk away with a beautiful wardrobe they're afraid to ruin.

Macie is different. She has spent years mastering how to look expensive on a budget — and now she puts that skill to work for you.

"You pay Macie. She saves you twice that in bad purchases — and makes you look like you spent ten times more."
Apply Now
01
The Macie Difference
She doesn't just tell you what to wear — she teaches you how to see. After working with Macie, you'll shop smarter for the rest of your life.
02
Real Outfits, Real Budget
Ross. TJ Maxx. Your closet. She works with what exists and finds what's missing — then finds it for less.
03
Confidence You'll Feel
Style isn't about labels. It's about how you carry yourself when you know you look good. That's what Macie delivers.

The Philosophy

Style isn't a
price tag.
It's a point of view.

Macie grew up in small-town Texas where budgets were real and fashion wasn't optional — it was self-expression. She learned that the most stylish women weren't the richest ones. They were the most intentional.

That philosophy drives every session. Macie doesn't dress you — she teaches you to see yourself differently. The confidence that comes from that? You can't put a price on it.

  • 🛍️
    Shop Smarter, Not MoreLess waste. More intention. Every piece earns its place.
  • ✨
    Confidence is the OutfitThe goal isn't clothes. The goal is how you feel walking into a room.
  • 💕
    Girls Supporting GirlsMacie gives the kind of honest, warm compliments only a real friend gives.
Is This Right For You?

Be honest with yourself.
Macie will be too.

✦ This is for you if...
  • 💕You're tired of opening your closet and feeling like you have nothing to wear — even though it's full.
  • 💕You want to look put-together and intentional, not like you're trying too hard.
  • 💕You're ready to invest in yourself — not just your wardrobe, but your confidence.
  • 💕You appreciate someone who tells you the truth, with love.
  • 💕You want a stylist who gets excited about finding the perfect Ross find as much as you do.
  • 💕You're in Austin or can do virtual — and you're ready to start.
✗ This is not for you if...
  • 🚫You're looking for someone to spend thousands at luxury boutiques on your behalf.
  • 🚫You want a stylist who will just say yes to everything — Macie is honest, always.
  • 🚫You're not ready to invest at least $250/month in a real, personalized styling relationship.
  • 🚫You want a one-size-fits-all formula — every session is personal and requires your engagement.
  • 🚫You're looking for a quick fix. Real style takes a real conversation.
The Process

From application
to transformation.

01
Apply
Fill out a short application so Macie understands where you are, what you want, and whether she can genuinely help you get there.
5 minutes
02
Discovery Call
A free 30-minute call to talk about your style, your life, and what "looking great" actually means for you. No commitment required.
Free · 30 min
03
Your First Session
Closet audit, shopping day, or a Zoom deep-dive — depending on your package. This is where the transformation begins.
Virtual or In-Person
04
Ongoing Styling
Monthly check-ins, wardrobe updates, and access to Macie's eye whenever you need it. Your style grows with your life.
Monthly Retainer
Meet Macie

The girl who made
Ross look like Chanel.

Growing up in small-town Texas, fashion wasn't a luxury — it was a puzzle. Macie learned early that style has nothing to do with a price tag. It's about fit, confidence, and knowing what works for your body and your life.

She spent years developing an eye that most stylists don't have: the ability to see what's possible with what exists. To find the $12 piece that elevates the whole outfit. To walk through a thrift store and see exactly what someone needs.

Now she does it professionally. And she brings the same warmth, honesty, and genuine joy to every client that she brings to every shopping trip — because for Macie, this isn't work. It's her favorite thing in the world.

Macie
Personal Stylist · Austin, Texas
✦ Fun
Loving · Humble
